componentSets.name: <Tabs>
componentSets.description: Tabs make it easy to explore and switch between different views.

componentSets.name: <Checkbox>
componentSets.description: Checkboxes allow the user to select one or more items from a set.

componentSets.name: Alert
componentSets.description: An alert displays a short, important message in a way that attracts the user's attention without interrupting the user's task.

componentSets.name: *Library / Logo Placeholder
componentSets.description: Placeholder logo SVGs

componentSets.name: <Skeleton>
componentSets.description: Display a placeholder preview of your content before the data gets loaded to reduce load-time frustration.

componentSets.name: <Table>
componentSets.description: Tables display sets of data. They can be fully customized.

componentSets.name: <Switch>
componentSets.description: Switches toggle the state of a single setting on or off.

componentSets.name: <Radio>
componentSets.description: Radio buttons allow the user to select one option from a set.

componentSets.name: <Chip>
componentSets.description: Chips are compact elements that represent an input, attribute, or action.

componentSets.name: <Link>
componentSets.description: The Link component allows you to easily customize anchor elements with your theme colors and typography styles.

componentSets.name: <BottomNavigation>
componentSets.description: Bottom navigation bars allow movement between primary destinations in an app.

componentSets.name: <Fab>
componentSets.description: A floating action button (FAB) performs the primary, or most common, action on a screen.

componentSets.name: Native / Date Time Picker
componentSets.description: Date pickers and Time pickers allow selecting a single value from a pre-determined set.

componentSets.name: *Custom / Page Heading
componentSets.description: Click on the description and actions slots for more options.

componentSets.name: *Custom / Section Headings
componentSets.description: Provide content and actions relative to a page.

componentSets.name: <Timeline>
componentSets.description: The timeline displays a list of events in chronological order.

componentSets.name: <Accordion>
componentSets.description: The accordion component allows the user to show and hide sections of related content on a page.

componentSets.name: <MenuItem>
componentSets.description: Menus display a list of choices on temporary surfaces.

componentSets.name: <Progress> | Linear
componentSets.description: Progress indicators commonly known as spinners, express an unspecified wait time or display the length of a process.

componentSets.name: <Rating>
componentSets.description: Ratings provide insight regarding others' opinions and experiences, and can allow the user to submit a rating of their own.

componentSets.name: <TextField> | Multiline
componentSets.description: Sizes, states and other props can be set from the inside TextField component.

componentSets.name: <FormControlLabel> | Checkbox
componentSets.description: Drop-in replacement of the Radio, Switch and Checkbox component. Use this component if you want to display an extra label.

componentSets.name: <ListItem>
componentSets.description: Lists are continuous, vertical indexes of text or images.

componentSets.name: <Tooltip>
componentSets.description: Tooltips display informative text when users hover over, focus on, or tap an element.

componentSets.name: <Toolbar>
componentSets.description: The App Bar displays information and actions relating to the current screen.

componentSets.name: <Pagination>
componentSets.description: The Pagination component enables the user to select a specific page from a range of pages.

componentSets.name: <Menu>
componentSets.description: Menus display a list of choices on temporary surfaces.

componentSets.name: <FormControlLabel> | Radio
componentSets.description: Drop-in replacement of the Radio, Switch and Checkbox component. Use this component if you want to display an extra label.

componentSets.name: <Paper>
componentSets.description: The elevation can be used to establish a hierarchy between other content. In practical terms, the elevation controls the size of the shadow applied to the surface. In dark mode, raising the elevation also makes the surface lighter.

componentSets.name: <Breadcrumbs>
componentSets.description: Breadcrumbs consist of a list of links that help a user visualize a page's location within the hierarchical structure of a website, and allow navigation up to any of its "ancestors".

componentSets.name: <TransferList>
<Slider>
componentSets.description: Sliders allow users to make selections from a range of values.

componentSets.name: <Progress> | Circular
componentSets.description: Progress indicators commonly known as spinners, express an unspecified wait time or display the length of a process.

componentSets.name: <AvatarGroup>
<SpeedDial>
componentSets.description: When pressed, a floating action button can display three to six related actions in the form of a speed dial.

componentSets.name: <StaticDateTimePicker>
componentSets.description: Date pickers and Time pickers allow selecting a single value from a pre-determined set.

componentSets.name: <MobileDateTimePicker>
componentSets.description: Date pickers and Time pickers allow selecting a single value from a pre-determined set.

componentSets.name: <Dialog>
componentSets.description: Dialogs inform users about a task and can contain critical information, require decisions, or involve multiple tasks.

componentSets.name: <ButtonGroup>
componentSets.description: The ButtonGroup component can be used to group related buttons.
